introSection: Flight Of The Pterosaur is a steel suspended roller coaster located at Paultons Park in Romsey, Hampshire, England, UK.

sections.title: History
sections.content: In late July 2015, the first track pieces arrived onsite. The ride later began testing in February 2016. Flight of the Pterosaur then opened with the Lost Kingdom themed area on 17 May 2016.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Flight of the Pterosaur was built as part of Paultons Park's new-for-2016 Lost Kingdom area. It is a 395m Suspended Family Coaster from Vekoma, similar to Freedom Flyer at Fun Spot America. It has dark brown track and light brown supports.

fullText:
Flight Of The Pterosaur is a steel suspended roller coaster located at Paultons Park in Romsey, Hampshire, England, UK.

In late July 2015, the first track pieces arrived onsite. The ride later began testing in February 2016. Flight of the Pterosaur then opened with the Lost Kingdom themed area on 17 May 2016.

Flight of the Pterosaur was built as part of Paultons Park's new-for-2016 Lost Kingdom area. It is a 395m Suspended Family Coaster from Vekoma, similar to Freedom Flyer at Fun Spot America. It has dark brown track and light brown supports.
